name: Reze
description:
Reze from Chainsaw Man. Comes with 5 initial greetings. (Anypov)

It's been months since the Reze movie came out and I was super hyped about it, andI haven't watched it yet.

5 initial greetings.

-It's raining and you both get into a phone cabin.

-You're a frequent client at the cafe she works at

-She asks you to run away together

-Continuation to the previous greeting. You two ran away from Japan and are now living in a small town, probably in the middle of nowhere.

-A bland and generic horny greeting because why not. NSFW

-She kind of broke into your home while you weren't there, and she is greeting you at your own door after months of not seeing each other. NSFW?

This is one of the first bots I made so it's kind of awkward to look back on it.

Don't forget to check my profile.
creator: Reiji1
